query:
UPDATE quotation_batches SET variantId = NULL WHERE variantId IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM product_variants 
    WHERE (variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' 
       OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%'
       OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%')
    AND id NOT IN (
      SELECT id FROM (
        SELECT id FROM product_variants 
        WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' 
           OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%'
           OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%'
        ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2
      ) AS k2
    )
  ) AS to_delete
);

DELETE FROM product_variants 
WHERE (variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' 
   OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%'
   OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%')
AND id NOT IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT id FROM product_variants 
    WHERE variantName LIKE '%测试%' OR variantName LIKE '%test%' OR variantName LIKE '%Test%' 
       OR variantName LIKE '%UI%' OR variantName LIKE '%SKU%' OR variantName LIKE '%验证%'
       OR variantName LIKE '%Automation%'
    ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2
  ) AS keep_ids
);
